user.title: YouTube Music Connector
user.description:
Use browser auth from a real YouTube Music request. A step-by-step guide is available here: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Recommended flow:
1. Open [music.youtube.com](https://music.youtube.com) in your normal browser and sign in.
2. Open the browser developer tools with `F12` (or `Ctrl+Shift+I`).
3. Open the `Network` tab.
4. Use YouTube Music once, for example by searching for a song.
5. Click a request whose URL contains `youtubei/v1/search` or `youtubei/v1/browse`.
6. In that request, open the `Headers` section and copy the full `Request Headers`.
7. Paste those headers below under `Browser auth import`.
8. Click `Submit`. The flow stores the browser auth automatically and tests the connection immediately.

The copied headers must include `authorization`, `cookie`, `content-type`, `x-goog-authuser`, and `x-origin`.

Validated so far: `{validation_status}`

Last error: `{last_error}`

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure YouTube Music Connector
reconfigure.description:
Update browser auth, language, or the default target player. Open [music.youtube.com](https://music.youtube.com), sign in, press `F12`, go to `Network`, click a `youtubei/v1/search` or `youtubei/v1/browse` request, open `Headers`, and copy the full `Request Headers`. This step runs the same connection test as the initial setup.

Guide: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Example path: `{example_header_path}`

Validated so far: `{validation_status}`

Last error: `{last_error}`

error.auth: Browser auth or the direct connection test to YouTube Music failed.
error.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
error.missing_header: A valid header file path is required.
error.no_results: The connection test succeeded technically, but the song search returned no results.

abort.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The integration was updated and the connection test succeeded.
abort.reconfigure_failed: The integration entry to update could not be found.

error.auth: Browser auth or the direct connection test to YouTube Music failed.
error.already_configured: This header file is already configured for another YouTube Music Connector instance.
error.missing_header: A valid header file path is required.
error.no_results: The connection test succeeded technically, but the song search returned no results.

init.title: YouTube Music Connector Options
init.description:
Update browser auth, language, or the default target player. Open [music.youtube.com](https://music.youtube.com), sign in, press `F12`, go to `Network`, click a `youtubei/v1/search` or `youtubei/v1/browse` request, open `Headers`, and copy the full `Request Headers`. Saving always runs a direct connection test.

Guide: [Browser Auth Guide]({browser_auth_guide_url})

Example path: `{example_header_path}`

Validated so far: `{validation_status}`
